case_title: RENE PAYAN VS. TIMOTHY KRISTIAN SUPRAPTO

docket_entries.description: RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM MAILED CERTIFIED TO DEFENDANT IS RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00);<SIGNATURE SECTION OF PROOF APPEARS TO BE A COPY> SERVED APR-18-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SUPRAPTO, TIMOTHY KRISTIAN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
